story.title: From baghdad to the world
story.p1: Founded in 2018, JayakHub was born from a simple idea: food delivery should be seamless, reliable, and accessible to everyone.
story.p2: We don't just deliver meals. We connect communities, support local restaurants, and bring people together through the food they love.
story.p3: Today, we're trusted by thousands of restaurants and have delivered millions of orders across Iraq.

Terms.alert: Please read this document carefully. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

contractual_relationship.title: 1. Contractual Relationship
contractual_relationship.content: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern the access or use by you, an individual, from within any country in the world of applications, websites, content, products, and services (the "Services") made available by Jayak Hub.

the_services.title: 2. The Services
the_services.content: The Services constitute a technology platform that enables users of Jayak Hub's mobile applications or websites provided as part of the Services to arrange and schedule delivery services with independent third party providers of such services, including independent third party logistics providers under agreement with Jayak Hub.

use_of_services.title: 3. Your Use of the Services
use_of_services.content: User Accounts. In order to use most aspects of the Services, you must register for and maintain an active personal user Services account ("Account"). You must be at least 18 years of age, or the age of legal majority in your jurisdiction (if different than 18), to obtain an Account.

payment.title: 4. Payment
payment.content: You understand that use of the Services may result in charges to you for the services or goods you receive from a Third Party Provider ("Charges"). After you have received services or goods obtained through your use of the Service, Jayak Hub will facilitate your payment of the applicable Charges on behalf of the Third Party Provider as such Third Party Provider's limited payment collection agent.

Privacy.alert: Please read this document carefully. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

info_collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
info_collection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create or modify your account, request on-demand services, contact customer support, or otherwise communicate with us. This information may include: name, email, phone number, postal address, profile picture, payment method, items requested (for delivery services), delivery notes, and other information you choose to provide.

use_info.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
use_info.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, such as to: facilitate payments, send receipts, provide products and services you request (and send related information), develop new features, provide customer support to Users and Drivers, and send updates and administrative messages.

sharing.title: 3. Sharing of Information
sharing.content: We may share the information we collect about you as described in this Statement or as described at the time of collection or sharing, including as follows: with Drivers to enable them to provide the Services you request; with third parties to provide you a service you requested through a partnership or promotional offering made by a third party or us; with the general public if you submit content in a public forum.

data_retention.title: 4. Data Retention
data_retention.content: We retain user data for as long as necessary for the purposes described above. This means that we retain different categories of data for different periods of time depending on the category of user to whom the data relates, the type of data, and the purposes for which we collected the data.

Cookies.alert: Please read this document carefully. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

what_are_cookies.title: 1. What are Cookies?
what_are_cookies.content: Cookies are small text files that are sent to or accessed from your web browser or your device's memory. A cookie typically contains the name of the domain (internet location) from which the cookie originated, the "lifetime" of the cookie (i.e., when it expires), and a randomly generated unique number or similar identifier.

how_we_use_cookies.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
how_we_use_cookies.content: We use cookies and other tracking technologies for the following purposes: to properly route traffic for effective server load distribution; to speed up page loading lines; to understand how you use our services and to improve your experience.

your_choices.title: 3. Your Choices
your_choices.content: You have the right to choose whether or not to accept cookies. However, they are an important part of how our Services work, so you should be aware that if you choose to refuse or remove cookies, this could affect the availability and functionality of the Services.

hero.title: How can we help you today?

where_is_my_order.question: Where is my order?
where_is_my_order.answer: You can track your order in real-time through the "My Orders" section in your account. Alternatively, use the tracking link sent to your email.

can_i_cancel.question: Can I cancel my order?
can_i_cancel.answer: Yes, you can cancel your order within 5 minutes of placing it without any charges. After that, cancellation availability depends on the restaurant preparation status.

missing_items.question: My order is missing items.
missing_items.answer: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please report the missing items through the "Help" section in your order details page, and we will process a refund or replacement immediately.

contact.title: Did not find what you were looking for?
contact.subtitle: Our support team is just a click away.

security.desc: End-to-end encryption for all payments and personal data.

monitoring.desc: Real-time GPS tracking of every order from kitchen to door.

privacy.desc: Masked phone numbers to protect your personal contact info.

zero_contact.desc: Contact-free delivery options available for every order.

community.title: Community Guidelines

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I change my restaurant logo?
faq.a1: Navigate to Settings > Profile and click on the camera icon to upload a new logo picture.
faq.a2: Payouts are processed weekly. You can expect funds to arrive in your designated bank account every Wednesday.
faq.q3: Can I set different hours for weekends?
faq.a3: Yes, go to Settings > Opening Hours. You can define specific time slots for each day of the week.
faq.q4: How do I add a new menu item?
faq.a4: Go to Menu Management, select a category, and click the 'Add Item' button to enter the item details and price.
faq.q5: What happens when I mark an order as 'Ready'?
faq.a5: The customer and delivery driver are notified immediately that the order is prepared and ready for pickup.
faq.q6: How do I handle a customer complaint?
faq.a6: Please reach out to our Support team via Live Chat or Phone. We will mediate the process.
faq.q7: Can I export my financial data?
faq.a7: Yes, you can export your payout and transaction history as a CSV file from the Finance tab.
faq.q8: How do I add team members?
faq.a8: Go to Account & Settings > Team roles, and click 'Invite Member' to assign them specific access permissions.

alert.title: Draft for review.
alert.description: These policies are production-ready templates tailored to JayakHub's subscription model and Iraqi operations. They are not legal advice and must be reviewed and approved by a qualified Iraqi lawyer before publication. Replace bracketed company details and host each policy at a public URL for Google Play.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.effective_date: Effective date: [DATE] · Operated by JayakHub, [legal entity], Baghdad, Iraq
privacy.intro: JayakHub ("we", "our") operates a food-ordering and delivery platform connecting customers, restaurants, and delivery drivers in Iraq. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.

s1.title: 1. Data we collect
items: Account data: name, phone number, email (optional), profile photo.
Location data: delivery addresses and, for drivers, real-time GPS while on an active order, to enable delivery and tracking.
Order data: items ordered, prices, delivery instructions, order history.
Payment data: payment method selected (e.g. Cash on Delivery). Card/wallet details, where supported, are processed by the payment provider; we do not store full card numbers.
Restaurant & driver data: business and KYC details, documents, vehicle and inspection records, earnings and payout details.
Device & usage data: device identifiers, app interactions, and diagnostics for security and fraud prevention.

s2.title: 2. How we use data
items: To process and deliver orders, calculate ETAs, and route drivers.
To process payments and payouts.
To provide support, prevent fraud, and meet legal obligations.
For service communications and, with consent, marketing.

s3.title: 3. Location tracking
s3.content: Driver location is collected only during active orders to enable delivery and live tracking, and stops when the driver goes offline. Customer location is used to set delivery addresses and ETAs.

s4.title: 4. Cookies & similar technologies
s4.content: Our website and apps use cookies/identifiers for sessions, preferences, analytics, and fraud prevention. You can manage consent in app settings.

s5.title: 5. Data sharing
s5.content: We share order-necessary data between the customer, the restaurant, and the assigned driver. We use service providers (hosting, mapping, payment processing) under contract. We do not sell your personal data.

s6.title: 6. Security
s6.content: We use encryption in transit, access controls, and monitoring. No system is perfectly secure; we will notify affected users and authorities of qualifying breaches as required by law.

s7.title: 7. Data retention
s7.content: We keep personal data only as long as needed for the service and legal/accounting requirements. On account deletion we remove personal data and retain limited order/financial records where law requires.

s8.title: 8. Your rights
s8.content: You may request access, export, correction, or deletion of your data, and manage marketing consent, in app settings or by contacting us. See the Account Deletion policy.

s9.title: 9. Contact
s9.content: Privacy questions: privacy@jayakhub.com · JayakHub, [address], Baghdad, Iraq.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using JayakHub you agree to these terms. JayakHub is a subscription platform: restaurants pay a fixed monthly subscription and JayakHub charges no commission on orders.

s1.title: 1. User (customer) responsibilities
items: Provide accurate account, address, and contact details.
Pay for orders by the selected method (e.g. Cash on Delivery).
Be available to receive deliveries and treat drivers respectfully.

s2.title: 2. Restaurant responsibilities
items: Maintain an active subscription and accurate menu, pricing, and availability.
Honor in-app prices (price-match) and food-safety standards.
Prepare orders promptly and accurately.

s3.title: 3. Driver responsibilities
items: Maintain valid documents, vehicle, and inspection.
Follow traffic and safety rules; handle food and cash responsibly.
Deliver orders promptly and communicate professionally.

s4.title: 4. Account suspension & termination
s4.content: We may suspend or terminate accounts for fraud, abuse, repeated violations, unsafe conduct, or non-payment of subscription, with notice where reasonable.

s5.title: 5. Platform rules
s5.content: No fraudulent orders, promo abuse, harassment, or unlawful use. JayakHub is an intermediary platform and is not the producer of the food.

s6.title: 6. Limitation of liability
s6.content: To the extent permitted by Iraqi law, JayakHub is not liable for indirect or consequential damages. Our total liability for any claim is limited as set out here. Nothing limits liability that cannot be excluded by law.

s7.title: 7. Changes & governing law
s7.content: We may update these terms with notice. These terms are governed by the laws of Iraq. Contact: legal@jayakhub.com.

s1.title: 1. Order cancellation
s1.content: Orders may be cancelled before the restaurant accepts them at no charge. After preparation begins, cancellation may not be possible, or partial charges may apply.

s2.title: 2. Restaurant mistakes
s2.content: For wrong, missing, or unsafe items, report the issue in-app with a photo. Valid complaints receive a full or partial refund.

s3.title: 3. Driver / delivery issues
s3.content: For non-delivery or significant delay caused by the platform or driver, you may be eligible for a refund and/or credit.

s4.title: 4. Payment disputes
s4.content: Disputes are reviewed by our support team with full order context. We may request evidence (photos, messages) before resolving.

s5.title: 5. Refund timelines
items: Cash on Delivery: refund issued as account credit or arranged return.
Card/wallet (where available): refunded to the original method, typically within 3–10 business days depending on the provider.

s1.title: 1. Service areas
s1.content: Delivery is available within active JayakHub zones in served Iraqi cities. Availability is shown at checkout based on your address.

s2.title: 2. Delivery windows & fees
s2.content: Estimated delivery times are shown before you order. A delivery fee (starting at approximately $2 / equivalent in IQD) applies and is displayed at checkout. Available payment methods vary by city and merchant.

s3.title: 3. Delays
s3.content: Delays can occur due to traffic, weather, restaurant volume, or driver availability. We update your ETA live and notify you of significant delays.

s4.title: 4. Driver availability
s4.content: During peak periods or low driver supply in a zone, delivery times may increase or ordering may be temporarily limited to protect quality.

deletion.title: Account Deletion Policy
deletion.effective_date: Effective date: [DATE] · Public deletion request URL: jayakhub.com/delete-account
deletion.intro: You can request deletion of your account and associated data at any time, in-app (Settings → Privacy → Delete Account) or via the public URL above, without reinstalling the app.

s1.title: 1. Customer account deletion
s1.content: Deletes your profile, saved addresses, payment methods, loyalty points, and marketing data. Removes active sessions and notifications.

s2.title: 2. Driver account deletion
s2.content: Deletes personal profile and contact data. Some KYC, earnings, and tax records are retained for the period required by law before erasure.

s3.title: 3. Restaurant account deletion
s3.content: Closes the subscription and removes business profile data. Financial and invoicing records are retained as required by accounting law.

s4.title: 4. Data retention rules
items: Personal data is deleted promptly upon a verified request.
Limited order, financial, and tax records are retained for the legally required period, then erased.
Data needed for fraud prevention or legal claims may be retained as permitted by law.

s5.title: 5. How to request
s5.content: In-app: Settings → Privacy → Delete Account. Web: jayakhub.com/delete-account. Questions: privacy@jayakhub.com.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I change my restaurant logo?
faq.a1: Navigate to Settings > Profile and click on the camera icon to upload a new logo picture.
faq.a2: Payouts are processed weekly. You can expect funds to arrive in your designated bank account every Wednesday.
faq.q3: Can I set different hours for weekends?
faq.a3: Yes, go to Settings > Opening Hours. You can define specific time slots for each day of the week.
faq.q4: How do I add a new menu item?
faq.a4: Go to Menu Management, select a category, and click the 'Add Item' button to enter the item details and price.
faq.q5: What happens when I mark an order as 'Ready'?
faq.a5: The customer and delivery driver are notified immediately that the order is prepared and ready for pickup.
faq.q6: How do I handle a customer complaint?
faq.a6: Please reach out to our Support team via Live Chat or Phone. We will mediate the process.
faq.q7: Can I export my financial data?
faq.a7: Yes, you can export your payout and transaction history as a CSV file from the Finance tab.
faq.q8: How do I add team members?
faq.a8: Go to Account & Settings > Team roles, and click 'Invite Member' to assign them specific access permissions.

searchBanner.title: How can we help you today?

mission.desc: JayaKhub started with a simple idea: make great food accessible to everyone, everywhere in Iraq. Today we're a growing team of engineers, operators, designers, and storytellers working together to transform how people eat and how restaurants grow.

move_fast.title: Move Fast

people_first.title: People First
people_first.desc: Every decision — product, policy, culture — starts with people's needs.

raise_bar.title: Raise the Bar
raise_bar.desc: We hold ourselves to a high standard in everything we build and deliver.

think_local.title: Think Local, Build Global
think_local.desc: Rooted in Iraq, built to work anywhere. We celebrate both.

intro.desc: From daily office lunches to executive catering, JayaKhub Business gives companies in Iraq a smarter way to manage team food — with full spending controls, group ordering, and one consolidated invoice.

team_ordering.title: Team Ordering
team_ordering.desc: Let your entire team order from the same restaurant or different ones simultaneously — all on one invoice.

spending.title: Spending Controls
spending.desc: Set per-person budgets, meal allowances, and approval workflows so you stay in control.

billing.title: Consolidated Billing
billing.desc: One monthly invoice for all team orders. No more chasing receipts or reimbursements.

scheduled.title: Scheduled Deliveries
scheduled.desc: Pre-schedule meals for team lunches, board meetings, or daily office catering.

account_manager.title: Dedicated Account Manager
account_manager.desc: A named point of contact who knows your account and resolves issues within the hour.

priority.title: Priority Delivery
priority.desc: Business orders jump the queue. Your team's meals arrive on time, every time.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.desc: Create your JayaKhub Business account in minutes. No contracts, no setup fees.

add_team.title: Add Your Team
add_team.desc: Invite employees by email. Set individual budgets and permissions from your dashboard.

order.title: Order Together
order.desc: Team members order from their app. All orders are grouped and delivered together.

pay.title: Review & Pay
pay.desc: Receive one clean invoice at month end. Integrate with your accounting software in one click.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: Perfect for small teams getting started.

business.name: Business
business.desc: For growing teams that need more control.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For large organizations with advanced needs.

t2.quote: The spending controls saved us hours of admin every month. Our finance team loves it.

t3.name: Lina Mahmoud

cta.title: Ready to feed your team?
cta.desc: Join hundreds of Iraqi companies already using JayaKhub Business. Set up takes less than 5 minutes.

r1.title: JayaKhub Raises $12M Series A to Expand Across Iraq
r1.excerpt: The leading Iraqi food delivery platform secures funding from regional and international investors to accelerate city expansion and technology development.

r2.title: JayaKhub Launches in Erbil and Sulaymaniyah
r2.excerpt: Following strong growth in Baghdad and Basra, JayaKhub brings its food delivery service to two major Kurdish cities, adding over 300 restaurant partners.

r3.title: JayaKhub Introduces Group Ordering for Business Customers
r3.excerpt: New B2B feature lets corporate teams order from multiple restaurants simultaneously, with consolidated billing and per-person budget controls.

r4.title: JayaKhub Reaches 1 Million Orders Delivered
r4.excerpt: Just three years after launch, JayaKhub celebrates delivering its one-millionth order — a testament to Iraq's growing appetite for convenient food delivery.

r5.title: JayaKhub Partners with Iraq's Top 50 Restaurant Chains
r5.excerpt: Strategic agreements with leading Iraqi restaurant groups bring exclusive menus, priority availability, and co-branded campaigns to the platform.

r6.title: JayaKhub Launches Rider Welfare Program
r6.excerpt: Industry-first initiative provides Iraq's delivery riders with insurance coverage, financial literacy training, and emergency support funds.

media_kit.title: Media Kit
media_kit.desc: Download our official media kit containing brand assets, logos, executive headshots, product screenshots, and company boilerplate for press use.

features.f1: Logo files (SVG, PNG, dark & light variants)

press_contact.title: Press Contact
press_contact.desc: For press inquiries, interview requests, or embargoed information, please contact our communications team directly. We aim to respond to all media enquiries within 24 hours.
